mapper.select: SELECT f.*, tm.theme_code, tm.theme_name FROM festival_info f LEFT JOIN festival_themes ft ON f.content_id = ft.content_id LEFT JOIN theme_master tm ON ft.theme_code = tm.theme_code WHERE NVL(f.is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y'

SELECT f.*, tm.theme_code, tm.theme_name FROM festival_info f LEFT JOIN festival_themes ft ON f.content_id = ft.content_id LEFT JOIN theme_master tm ON ft.theme_code = tm.theme_code WHERE f.content_id = #{content_id} AND NVL(f.is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y'

SELECT f.*, tm.theme_code, tm.theme_name FROM festival_info f LEFT JOIN festival_themes ft ON f.content_id = ft.content_id LEFT JOIN theme_master tm ON ft.theme_code = tm.theme_code WHERE f.content_id = #{content_id} AND NVL(f.is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y'

SELECT f.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_planner_step WHERE source_content_id = f.content_id) AS save_count, (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(rating), 2), 0) FROM festival_review WHERE content_id = f.content_id AND NVL(is_deleted, 'N') = 'N') AS avg_rating, tm.theme_code, tm.theme_name FROM festival_info f LEFT JOIN festival_themes ft ON f.content_id = ft.content_id LEFT JOIN theme_master tm ON ft.theme_code = tm.theme_code ORDER BY f.created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM festival_info f WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FESTIVAL_THEMES m WHERE m.content_id = f.content_id ) AND f.overview IS NOT NULL

SELECT f.content_id, f.title, f.overview, f.region_code, f.modified_time, (SELECT LISTAGG(t.theme_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY t.theme_name) FROM FESTIVAL_THEMES ft JOIN THEME_MASTER t ON ft.theme_code = t.theme_code WHERE ft.content_id = f.content_id) as themes FROM festival_info f WHERE f.overview IS NOT NULL AND (f.INDEXED_MODIFIED_TIME IS NULL OR f.modified_time > f.INDEXED_MODIFIED_TIME)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT content_id, title, overview, first_image FROM festival_info WHERE addr1 LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%' AND overview IS NOT NULL AND NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY modified_time DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
SELECT content_id, title, addr1, first_image, event_start_date, event_end_date, overview FROM festival_info WHERE content_id = #{content_id} AND NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT f.content_id, f.title, f.overview, f.first_image FROM festival_info f WHERE f.overview IS NOT NULL AND NVL(f.is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY f.modified_time DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT final_res.*, tm.theme_code, tm.theme_name FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, res.* FROM (
SELECT * FROM festival_info
AND NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y'
AND ( title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR (overview IS NOT NULL AND overview LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') )
AND title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND region_code = #{region_code}
AND sigungu_code = #{sigungu_code}
AND event_start_date >= #{event_start_date}
AND event_end_date <= #{event_end_date}
AND REPLACE(event_end_date, '-', '') >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY view_count DESC
ORDER BY (NVL(like_count, 0) + (NVL(rating_avg, 0) * 10)) DESC, NVL(like_count, 0) DESC, created_time DESC
ORDER BY event_start_date ASC
ORDER BY event_start_date ASC, created_time DESC
ORDER BY title ASC
ORDER BY created_time DESC
) res WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rnum >= #{startRow} ) final_res LEFT JOIN festival_themes ft ON final_res.content_id = ft.content_id LEFT JOIN theme_master tm ON ft.theme_code = tm.theme_code ORDER BY final_res.rnum ASC
SELECT f.* FROM FESTIVAL_INFO f JOIN FESTIVAL_LIKE l ON f.CONTENT_ID = l.CONTENT_ID WHERE l.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND NVL(f.is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT f.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.content_id ORDER BY NVL(f.view_count, 0) DESC, NVL(like_count,0) DESC, event_start_date ASC) as rn FROM festival_info f JOIN region_master r ON f.region_code = r.region_code WHERE r.region_name = #{region} AND NVL(f.is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' ) WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY NVL(view_count, 0) DESC, NVL(like_count,0) DESC, event_start_date ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT content_id, title, addr1, event_start_date, event_end_date, first_image FROM festival_info WHERE REPLACE(event_end_date, '-', '') >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND REPLACE(event_start_date, '-', '') <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY REPLACE(event_end_date, '-', '') ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM festival_info WHERE NVL(is_visible, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FESTIVAL_LIKE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{member_id} AND CONTENT_ID = #{content_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE festival_info SET overview = #{overview,jdbcType=CLOB}, homepage = #{homepage,jdbcType=CLOB}, sponsor1_tel = #{sponsor1_tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spon_place = #{spon_place,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, use_time_festival = #{use_time_festival,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE content_id = #{content_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO festival_info ( content_id, title, addr1, addr2, region_code, sigungu_code, first_image, first_image2, map_x, map_y, map_level, event_start_date, event_end_date, created_time, modified_time, overview, sponsor1_tel, homepage, spon_place, use_time_festival ) VALUES ( #{content_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{region_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sigungu_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{first_image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{first_image2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{map_x,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{map_y,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{map_level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{event_start_date,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{event_end_date,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modified_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{overview,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{sponsor1_tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{homepage,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{spon_place,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{use_time_festival,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE festival_info SET title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addr1 = #{addr1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addr2 = #{addr2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, region_code = #{region_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sigungu_code = #{sigungu_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, first_image = #{first_image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, first_image2 = #{first_image2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, map_x = #{map_x,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, map_y = #{map_y,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, map_level = #{map_level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, event_start_date = #{event_start_date,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, event_end_date = #{event_end_date,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modified_time = #{modified_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, overview = #{overview,jdbcType=CLOB}, sponsor1_tel = #{sponsor1_tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, homepage = #{homepage,jdbcType=CLOB}, spon_place = #{spon_place,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, use_time_festival = #{use_time_festival,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE content_id = #{content_id}
